title: 修复 finish 后 review readiness 未收敛

sources.reason: Finish lifecycle currently records passed checks without promoting reviewReadiness.
Defines readiness as an input to acceptance and final governance state.

problemStatement: ai-finish archives Summary files with reviewReadiness.status still set to not_ready even after all required checks pass, creating contradictory completion evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All required verification results pass and no unknowns remain.
Documented residual risks produce ready_with_risks rather than an overclaim of ready.
Any failed required verification or unknowns preserve not_ready.

riskAssessment.reason: Readiness is a decision signal; promotion must be evidence-based and must not overclaim when risks or unknowns remain.

executionDecision.reason: The root cause is local to ai-finish, the readiness policy is explicit, and unit tests can cover promotion and fail-closed behavior.

preReviewWarnings: Review that readiness is promoted only from verification evidence and residual risk is preserved.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: ai-finish promotes a fully verified Summary to ready or ready_with_risks before status generation and archive.
Failed required checks or remaining unknowns do not promote readiness.
Regression tests cover all readiness outcomes.
Historical archive evidence remains append-only and is not rewritten.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: ai-finish archives Summary files with reviewReadiness.status still not_ready after all required checks pass.
constraints: Promote readiness only from recorded verification evidence.
Preserve residual risk and leave historical archive files immutable.
intent.rationale: Review readiness is a governance decision signal and must converge with the evidence produced by the finish lifecycle.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested correction of the self-check finding and continuation of the remediation loop.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
